articles.author: Rachel Treisman
articles.title: Great American State Fair opens to mixed reactions - NPR
articles.description: The massive state fair underway on the National Mall kicked off with a Trump campaign-style rally, and not all 50 states are taking part. Is this Great American State Fair for everyone?
articles.content: The massive state fair underway on the National Mall kicked off with a Trump campaign-style rally, and not all 50 states are taking part. Is this Great American State Fair for everyone?
